para_trans: Government Circular No. S - 10/2026 Q. No.170 / Forest-03 (F-3)

3. Similarly, instructions have also been issued from time to time to return the notified forest area under the purview of the erstwhile Revenue Department, which has not been allocated by the Revenue Department for various purposes, to the Forest Department. The Supreme Court as well as the government level have been given. When processing forest area records as aforesaid, the non-encroachment forest area which may be found to have remained in the possession of the Revenue Department without allotment of forest area should be immediately transferred to the Forest Department. Similarly, the forest department should immediately take over the area transferred by the revenue department and start plantation, conservation, etc. works on it and include them in the working plan.
4. Forest area as aforesaid to which the provisions of the Forest Conservation and Preservation Act, 1980 apply.
Such areas should be updated on the PM-GATISHAKTI portal.
5. This Government Circular is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
